title: Change Scrum Template

posts.author: JanSalesStudio (Jan)
posts.cookedHtml:
In Monday Dev, we do have a standard template, my client want some adjustments to the Scrum template. However, I do not see the possibility to change the template (the template is from Monday itself). I can change every single Scrum team board but that seems not feasible, having 15 scrum teams and more are coming.

I hope some one can help me on my way.

Thank you in advance!

posts.author: tvanvuuren (Tristan van Vuuren)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any solution to this issue yet? I have the same challenge and want to make minor adjustments to the Scrum template.
